context: Tests whether the agent writes rich, descriptive sound effect prompts — combining multiple audio elements, specifying style/genre, mentioning mood or atmospheric context, and tuning prompt_influence to match each sound's creative intent.

checklist.name: Prompts are specific
checklist.description: Every text prompt is at least 5 words long — no single-word or two-word descriptions like 'Explosion' or 'Scary wind'

checklist.name: Combined elements
checklist.description: At least two prompts combine multiple distinct sound elements (e.g. contains 'with', 'and', or comma-separated sound sources)

checklist.name: Style specified
checklist.description: At least two prompts include a style, genre, or production descriptor (e.g. 'cinematic', '8-bit', 'retro', 'horror', 'orchestral', 'lo-fi')

checklist.name: Mood or context mentioned
checklist.description: At least two prompts include an atmospheric, emotional, or spatial context (e.g. location description, emotional tone, scene context)

checklist.name: prompt_influence varied
checklist.description: At least two different prompt_influence values are used across the generated sounds (not all the same value)

checklist.name: Valid prompt_influence range
checklist.description: All prompt_influence values are between 0 and 1 (inclusive)

checklist.name: High adherence for precise sounds
checklist.description: At least one sound effect uses a prompt_influence value of 0.6 or higher (for sounds that need to closely match the brief)

checklist.name: Duration used
checklist.description: At least one sound effect specifies a duration_seconds value
